[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A dark, grainy image shows pixelated large white text reading “ITAYO” over a blurred scene with a yellow smiley-like face.

Main Subject:
The main visual focus is the pixelated white text “ITAYO” appearing twice, one near the top left and another near the lower left, alongside a blurred background scene and two yellow circular faces with simple facial marks.

Setting:
The background appears to be an indoor or built environment shown as a dim, bluish, blurry scene, but the exact setting is unclear. The overall lighting looks dark with a cool, low-contrast tint.

Visual Details:
The composition is tightly framed, with the text “ITAYO” in blocky, pixel-style lettering. Behind the text, a vague, dark structure and light-gray area are visible, with diagonal and vertical shapes that resemble equipment or building elements, but details are unclear. Two yellow circular faces with simple black and dark markings are visible: one at the top right and another at the bottom right, both rendered in a blocky pixel style. The image has heavy pixelation and motion blur or low resolution, and the lighting is subdued with dark shadows and muted colors.

Visible Text:
ITAYO
ITAYO

Practical Summary:
The image displays pixelated white text reading “ITAYO” over a blurred dark scene. Yellow smiley-like faces appear near the upper right and lower right corners.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
